name: FIRST UNITED CORP/MD/
business: First United Corporation is a financial holding company that, through its subsidiaries, provides retail and commercial banking services, wealth management, trust services, and insurance products to customers in Western Maryland and Northeastern West Virginia.
sellsTo: individuals and businesses in Maryland and West Virginia

exposures.sentence: The Bank also provides safe deposit and night depository facilities, insurance products and trust services.

Our operational or communications systems or infrastructure may fail or may be the subject of a breach or cyber-attack that, if successful, could adversely affect our business or disrupt business continuity.

The Bank's wealth department offers a full range of trust services, including personal trust, investment agency accounts, charitable trusts, retirement accounts including IRA roll-overs, 401(k) accounts and defined benefit plans, estate administration and estate planning.
